mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.type, c.priority, c.partner_id, p.name AS partner_name, c.user_id, su.name AS user_name, c.company_id, rc.name AS company_name, c.expected_revenue, c.probability, c.stage_id, cs.name AS stage_name, c.email_from, c.phone, c.description, c.active FROM crm_lead c LEFT JOIN res_partner p ON c.partner_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON c.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN res_company rc ON c.company_id = rc.id LEFT JOIN crm_stage cs ON c.stage_id = cs.id
AND (c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND p.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.partnerName}, '%')
AND su.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND rc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.companyName}, '%')
AND cs.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.stageName}, '%')
ORDER BY c.id DESC
